report.summary: Day 71 cycle-close v5: Site is LIVE (Vercel trial concern was premature). 5/7 API routes healthy; /api/market-metrics 404 because route was never committed to git. /trading still 404. 42 TS errors unchanged. 48 modified files uncommitted for 7+ days.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: HOMEPAGE LIVE: degen0x.com loads correctly. Title: 'degen0x - Onboarding the Next 1 Billion to Web3'. No visible errors.

TYPESCRIPT ERRORS: 42 errors in 2 files — unchanged from v4. Files: src/lib/structured-data.examples.ts (38 errors, JSX in .ts file), src/app/learn/crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx (4 errors, unescaped > in JSX).
PUBLISHED PAGES AUDIT: 480 slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES. ~103 slugs lack dedicated page.tsx (served by dynamic [slug] routes for /learn/*, /wallets/*, /investing/*, /taxes/*, /blog/*).
404 PAGES: /trading returns 404 (carry-over, page.tsx missing). /compare/exchanges returns 404 (missing).
NO NEW COMMITS since last cycle — no new regressions introduced.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: API HEALTH (live check via Chrome): 5/7 routes returning 200 with valid JSON data.
HEALTHY: /api/health (uptime 33s), /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields — all returning data.
FAILING [P1]: /api/market-metrics returns 404. Root cause: route.ts exists locally (150 lines) but was NEVER COMMITTED to git. Must commit and deploy to fix.
RATE LIMITER GAP [P1]: Only /api/health and /api/cache-stats have rate limiting. Core data routes (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, defi-yields) remain unprotected.
FALLBACK GAP [P1]: /api/defi-yields has no hardcoded fallback data — will error if DefiLlama is unreachable.

sections.title: DevOps
items: SITE STATUS: LIVE on Vercel. Previous v4 report's P0 concern about expired trial was premature — site is operational.
LAST DEPLOY: Commit e999560 (Mar 17) — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'. 7 days since last deploy.

UNCOMMITTED WORK: 48 tracked files modified but not committed, including layout.tsx, globals.css, sitemap.ts, middleware.ts, and multiple page files. 732 total untracked/modified items in working directory.
BUILD STATUS: Cannot run full production build in sandbox (OOM). Last successful Vercel build was 4m 11s. No code changes deployed since.
SECURITY HEADERS: Middleware sets X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy — unchanged.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: Nothing. Zero commits, zero deploys since v4 report.
GOOD NEWS: Site confirmed LIVE despite Vercel trial concerns from previous cycle.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Commit the 48 modified files (including /api/market-metrics route) and deploy. 7 days of uncommitted work is high risk.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix 42 TypeScript errors in 2 files before next clean commit.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /trading hub page still missing — multiple cycles unresolved.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Wire rate limiter to 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Add fallback data to /api/defi-yields.
NEXT CYCLE PRIORITIES: 1) Fix TS errors, 2) Commit + deploy all pending work, 3) Wire rate limiters, 4) Build /trading page.
